arts.ttl: Club Brugge in talks with Hamburger SV over former Barcelona midfielder
arts.sum: BILD are reporting that Club Brugge have began preliminary discussions with Hamburger SV over the transfer of midfielder Ludovit Reis. The 24-year-old has a contract with the Bundesliga 2 club…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides update on Barcelona contract talks
arts.sum: Hansi Flick signed only a two-year contract when he succeeded Xavi as Barcelona manager.

arts.ttl: Dortmund travel to team hotel without duo ahead of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund travelled to their team hotel without two key players ahead of their clash with Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona earmark surprise position for summer transfer plans
arts.sum: Barcelona, like most clubs, are in the midst of their planning for the summer transfer window, and a surprising shift in their plans has been reported. The Blaugrana are still unsure of their capacity to strengthen this summer due to their salary limit situation. arts.ttl: Barcelona set new target for Camp Nou return as new permit is granted
arts.sum: Barcelona will finish this season at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys this season, but the pressure is on to make their way back down Montjuic to Camp Nou as soon as possible. As the delay for their return approaches six months, there is hope that they could be back early next season. arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Borussia Dortmund-Barcelona: Robert Lewandowski doubt and Alejandro Balde out
arts.sum: Barcelona will be sending a weaker team to Germany to face Borussia Dortmund at 21:00 CEST at the Signal Iduna Park, after losing starting left-back Alejandro Balde over the weekend. There are also doubts up fron for Hansi Flick’s side. arts.ttl: FC Barcelona to Wear White Shorts vs Borussia Dortmund in Champions League
arts.sum: FC Barcelona will sport an altered kit combination for their crucial Champions League match against Borussia Dortmund tonight.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Barcelona lose out on 18-year-old Spanish talent as contract is agreed
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are generally competing for the very best talents in Spanish football, and few escape their grasps. That is the case for 18-year-old winger Antonio Cordero though, who is headed for the Premier League. arts.ttl: Iñigo Martínez gives new meaning to 'remontada' for Barcelona
arts.sum: It once looked like the ship to Barcelona had sailed for Iñigo Martínez. Now he's Barça's defensive leader, vital to their hopes of winning the treble.

arts.ttl: ‘€80-90m’ – Barcelona set asking price for insane sale
arts.sum: Barcelona have been accused of some curious decisions in the transfer market in recent years, and they may be on the verge of scratching a few heads again. After a campaign that has him in contention for the Ballon d’Or, Barcelona are reportedly open to selling the Brazilian.
